description: Observe-only registry of external repos and skills under consideration for future study or integration.

entries.name: TradingAgents
entries.proposed_use: Study multi-agent trading strategy patterns and debate-style agent architecture for use in Stephen the stocks bot and future Polymarket work
entries.notes: Multi-agent LLM framework for financial trading research by TauricResearch. High relevance to mission-control agent orchestration patterns.

entries.name: jcode
entries.proposed_use: Study lightweight coding agent or task-routing patterns that may complement mission-control CLI agent design
entries.notes: Small coding tool repo. Low risk. Observe and assess for CLI agent patterns.

entries.name: mattpocock-skills
entries.proposed_use: Study skill registration and dispatch patterns for use in mission-control skills subsystem
entries.notes: Matt Pocock's skills repo. Useful reference for structured skill dispatch and type-safe skill registration.

entries.name: browserbase-skills
entries.proposed_use: Study browser automation skill patterns for potential future agent browser-use integration in mission-control
entries.notes: Browserbase skills repo. Relevant if mission-control agents need browser-use capabilities in future phases.

entries.name: sim
entries.proposed_use: Study simulation studio architecture for multi-agent workflow design patterns applicable to mission-control orchestration layer
entries.notes: SimStudio AI visual agent workflow tool. Observe for orchestration and simulation patterns.

entries.name: superpowers
entries.proposed_use: Study developer superpower augmentation patterns for possible integration into mission-control agent capability layer
entries.notes: obra/superpowers developer augmentation toolkit. Low risk. Review for agent capability extension ideas.
